# Keiran Flynn

> Executive English conversation coaching for founders and international professionals.

## Canonical website
- https://keiranflynn.com/conversation

## Important pages
- Services: https://keiranflynn.com/conversation
- About: https://keiranflynn.com/about
- Contact: https://keiranflynn.com/contact
- Privacy: https://keiranflynn.com/privacy
- Blog (Insights & Articles): https://keiranflynn.com/blog

## Service summary
- UK-native consultant based in Bang Tao, Phuket, Thailand.
- 1:1 strategic English conversation sessions for advanced speakers.
- Sessions available in person (Phuket) and online.
- Booking via Cal.com; confirmation follows payment.
- Specialises in business English, executive presence, high-stakes communication, and investor call preparation.

## Blog articles
- https://keiranflynn.com/blog/english-under-pressure — Why Your English Breaks Down Under Pressure (And What to Do About It)
- https://keiranflynn.com/blog/negotiation-english — The Language of Negotiation: How to Hold Your Position, Make Concessions, and Close in English
- https://keiranflynn.com/blog/english-for-russian-founders — English Business Communication for Russian Speakers: Patterns Worth Addressing
- https://keiranflynn.com/blog/executive-presence-language — Building Executive Presence Through Language: What Senior Leaders Say Differently
- https://keiranflynn.com/blog/investor-pitch-english — How to Prepare for an Investor Call in English When It's Not Your First Language
- https://keiranflynn.com/blog/difference — English Teaching vs. Strategic Conversation: Why the Distinction Matters
- https://keiranflynn.com/blog/grammar — Why Grammar Lessons Won't Fix Your Business English
